vocab.meaning: kỹ năng thể thao điêu luyện/sự thành thạo trong thể thao
vocab.example: Team sports are widely celebrated as they allow individuals to showcase their sporting prowess while working toward a common goal.
In my country, football is deeply intertwined with our national identity, especially during major international tournaments.

vocab.meaning: một môi trường cạnh tranh cực kỳ khốc liệt
vocab.example: Many young athletes are drawn to team sports because they thrive in a fiercely competitive environment.

vocab.word: unite people from all walks of life
vocab.ipa: /juːˈnaɪt ˈpiː.pəl frəm ɔːl wɔːks əv laɪf/
vocab.meaning: gắn kết mọi người từ mọi tầng lớp xã hội
vocab.example: Basketball has this unique ability to unite people from all walks of life, transcending social and economic barriers.
Major volleyball matches are often broadcast on prime-time television, reflecting their immense popularity.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở hạ tầng thể thao
vocab.example: The government has invested heavily in sporting infrastructure to encourage more teenagers to take up team-based activities.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng tinh thần thể thao (thắng không kiêu, bại không nản)
vocab.example: Participating in group sports is an excellent way for children to cultivate sportsmanship and respect for their opponents.

vocab.meaning: những người ủng hộ nhiệt thành
vocab.example: The local stadium is always packed with fervent supporters who cheer for their home team until the very last minute.
Beyond professional games, there are countless amateur leagues that provide a social outlet for working adults.

vocab.meaning: tình đồng chí/tình bạn thân thiết trong một nhóm
vocab.example: The most appealing aspect of team sports is the sense of camaraderie that develops among players during the season.
